nasb.text: And they were seeking to seize Him, and yet they feared the people, for they understood that He spoke the parable against them. And so they left Him and went away.

esv.text: And they were seeking to arrest him but feared the people, for they perceived that he had told the parable against them. So they left him and went away.

cnv.text: 他們知道他這比喻是針對他們說的，就想要捉拿他，但因為害怕群眾，只好離開他走了。

ccb.text: 他们听出这比喻是针对他们说的，就想逮捕耶稣，但又害怕百姓，只好先离开了。

csbs.text: 祭司长们、律法师们和长老们知道这比喻是针对他们而说的，就想拘捕耶稣。可是他们怕民众，于是离开耶稣走了。
